ARANCHA RAMÍREZ

Design Engineering · Imperial College London

Designing for human experience and environmental impact.
Bridging analytical depth with stakeholder communication.

View work About me
ACTIB ALL-INK HIVE-FU Mario's Garden Nest Assured URSA Desalination HouseScout

A note on practice

I'm interested in the gap between analytical rigour and the people who must act on its outputs — making complex systems legible to the humans inside them. My work spans wearables, sustainable systems, infrastructure economics, and educational play. Whichever scale, the question is the same: how do we make this easier to live with?

My projects →
01 / 10

ACTIB

A volleyball training glove with real-time haptic feedback for setters.
03 / 10

HIVE-FU

An autonomous medical ultrasound system designed for deep-space missions.
07 / 10

Desalination

A systems-level analysis of desalination technology as a response to global water stress.
05 / 10

Nest Assured

A plug-and-play RFID tracker designed for young adults with ADHD.
